_documentation: Per-machine overrides for ~/.claude/settings.json. Gitignored. Copy this file to settings.local.json and customize.

_examples.disable_all_hooks_on_ssh_sessions: Set CLAUDE_QUIET=1 in shell rc; the hooks dispatcher honors it.
_examples.machine_specific_mcp_server: Add a 'mcpServers' entry that only this machine needs (e.g., a local-dev MCP).
